# DatetimeInput

Collects a date, time, or date-and-time as locale-aware masked text.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/datetime-input
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="datetime-input" example={0} code={`<DatetimeInput aria-label="Date" />`} />

```tsx
<DatetimeInput aria-label="Date" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="datetime-input"
  example={1}
  code={`<DatetimeInput aria-label="Time" mode="time" />`}
/>

```tsx
<DatetimeInput aria-label="Time" mode="time" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="datetime-input"
  example={2}
  code={`<DatetimeInput aria-label="Date and time" mode="datetime" />`}
/>

```tsx
<DatetimeInput aria-label="Date and time" mode="datetime" />
```

## Props

| Prop                 | Type                                               | Required | Default | Description                                                                        |
| -------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `value`              | `Date \| undefined`                                | No       | -       | Selected value (controlled). In \`time\` mode only the time portion is meaningful. |
| `onChange`           | `((date: Date \| undefined) => void) \| undefined` | No       | -       | Called with the parsed value, or \`undefined\` while it is incomplete/invalid.     |
| `mode`               | `DatetimeInputMode \| undefined`                   | No       | -       | Which fields to collect: a date, a time, or both. Defaults to \`date\`.            |
| `locale`             | `string \| undefined`                              | No       | -       | BCP-47 locale controlling date field order (defaults to the runtime locale).       |
| `size`               | `InputSize`                                        | No       | -       | -                                                                                  |
| `invalid`            | `boolean`                                          | No       | -       | -                                                                                  |
| `disabled`           | `boolean`                                          | No       | -       | -                                                                                  |
| `className`          | `string`                                           | No       | -       | -                                                                                  |
| `id`                 | `string`                                           | No       | -       | -                                                                                  |
| `'aria-label'`       | `string \| undefined`                              | No       | -       | Accessible name for the whole field.                                               |
| `'aria-describedby'` | `string`                                           | No       | -       | -                                                                                  |
| `endSlot`            | `ReactNode`                                        | No       | -       | Trailing content rendered inside the field (e.g. a calendar trigger).              |

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
